productName: Mindmelt Live Resin All In One - Lemon Cherry Biscuits - 1g - (H) - DOH
description: This hybrid disposable carries Lemon Cherry Biscuits in a ready-to-go pen with the battery built right in — grab it, hit it, recycle it when it's done. Grab-and-go convenience, a bright, zesty lemon flavor, delivering an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
